'''zhakafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placki|placki]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placki|placki]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhakafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhækæfæth|zhækæfæth]] || [[word:zhækæfæj|zhækæfæj]] || [[word:zhækæfæsh|zhækæfæsh]] || [[word:zhækæfæ|zhækæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhakakafath|zhakakafath]] || [[word:zhakakafaj|zhakakafaj]] || [[word:zhakakafash|zhakakafash]] || [[word:zhakakafa|zhakakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhakafath|zhakafath]] || [[word:zhakafaj|zhakafaj]] || [[word:zhakafash|zhakafash]] || [[word:zhakafa|zhakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhakaffath|zhakaffath]] || [[word:zhakaffaj|zhakaffaj]] || [[word:zhakaffash|zhakaffash]] || [[word:zhakaffaf|zhakaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhakafatha|zhakafatha]] || [[word:zhakafaja|zhakafaja]] || [[word:zhakafasha|zhakafasha]] || [[word:zhakafaka|zhakafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhakafath|zhakafath]] || [[word:zhakafaj|zhakafaj]] || [[word:zhakafash|zhakafash]] || [[word:zhakafa|zhakafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhakafathal|zhakafathal]] || [[word:zhakafajal|zhakafajal]] || [[word:zhakafashal|zhakafashal]] || [[word:zhakafakal|zhakafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhakafathatha|zhakafathatha]] || [[word:zhakafajaja|zhakafajaja]] || [[word:zhakafashasha|zhakafashasha]] || [[word:zhakafaka|zhakafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhakafathan|zhakafathan]] || [[word:zhakafajan|zhakafajan]] || [[word:zhakafashan|zhakafashan]] || [[word:zhakafakan|zhakafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhakafathaoro|zhakafathaoro]] || [[word:zhakafajaoro|zhakafajaoro]] || [[word:zhakafashaoro|zhakafashaoro]] || [[word:zhakafakaoro|zhakafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
